summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of SaaS multi-tenant municipal dashboard. All core features working correctly including dashboard KPIs, llamadas table with filters, incidencias cards by priority, comunicados with n8n integration, and Onyx chatbot iframe. Navigation and state management functioning perfectly.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with KPIs (24 llamadas hoy, 3 incidencias abiertas, 98% satisfacción)
Dashboard chart shows calls for last 7 days with Vapi/Retell breakdown
Llamadas page shows table with data, filters work (proveedor, estado)
Llamadas modal shows call details when clicking 'Ver detalle'
Incidencias page shows cards grouped by priority (alta, media, baja, cerradas)
Nueva incidencia form opens and can create new incidencia
Incidencia detail modal shows and allows viewing details
Comunicados page shows stats and communication cards
Nuevo comunicado form opens with channel selection and preview
Mock n8n integration working with simulated delay
Chatbot page loads with Onyx iframe
Sidebar navigation works for all pages
Configuración page loads and shows tenant info
Multi-tenant functionality working (Santa Gadea del Cid)
Search functionality working across all pages
State management with Zustand working correctly
